name: Nexus
description: AI-powered content intelligence platform — ingests, analyzes, routes, and publishes content across channels

domains.name: Ingestion
domains.description: Acquires content from external sources (RSS, web, CSV, webhooks, social, filesystem)

domains.name: Processing
domains.description: AI-powered multi-agent analysis pipeline (classify, fact-check, bias-check, orchestrate)

domains.name: Editorial
domains.description: Human review workflow with async AI assistance and approval gates

domains.name: Publishing
domains.description: Multi-channel content distribution (website, social, newsletter, webhook)

domains.name: Analytics
domains.description: Real-time and historical reporting with WebSocket streaming

domains.name: Users
domains.description: Authentication, user management, API keys, and role-based access

domains.name: Content
domains.description: Central content entity and cross-domain event hub

domains.name: Notifications
domains.description: Multi-channel alert delivery (email, Slack, in-app, digests)

domains.name: Settings
domains.description: System configuration, rules engine, and feature flags

domains.name: Monitoring
domains.description: Health checks and anomaly detection for all services
